title: Haaland's partner not happy with game 'scratches'
summary: Erling Haaland joked that his partner dislikes the scratches he accumulates from physical Premier League battles, highlighting the toll of top-flight football's intense defending.
content: Erling Haaland has joked that his partner "isn't happy" about the number of scratches on his body after the physical battles with Premier League defenders.

title: Konaté: 'Big chance' I will stay at Liverpool

title: Bouda ends Lloris' scoreless run in San Jose win
summary: Ousseni Bouda scored twice in the second half as San Jose Earthquakes defeated Los Angeles FC 4-1 on Sunday. Bouda's goals ended Hugo Lloris' 593-minute scoreless streak.
